steps.title: Find the one unit factor
steps.content: For $f(x)=k(1.72)^x$, increasing $x$ by $1$ multiplies the output by $1.72$. That is the factor for the same percent increase.

steps.title: Make four units equivalent
steps.content: For $g(x)$ to have that same factor when $x$ increases by $4$, the exponent on $1.72$ must increase by $1$ when $x$ increases by $4$. $$ k(1.72^x)^{\frac{1}{4}}=k(1.72)^{x/4} $$ Since $$ \frac{x+4}{4}=\frac{x}{4}+1 $$, this has the needed factor. The answer is A.
